item.description:
## [1.2.2]
### Fixed - Fixed onboard profile support for Basilisk V3 35K by sharing the Basilisk V3 USB-family profile configuration across Basilisk V3, Basilisk V3 Pro, and Basilisk V3 35K. - Fixed Restore Last Profile so reconnects refresh saved DPI stage tables without forcing the saved active DPI stage over the mouse's current stage. - Fixed Restore Last Profile lighting after mouse wake, including Bluetooth realtime wake updates and receiver-backed USB recovery.
